'''鈭歳-z-dh-d''' ('''karazdhedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:timeshift|timeshift]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-z-dh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:timeshift|timeshift]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-z-dh-d
|-
! Lemma
| karazdhedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirazdhedoko|thirazdhedoko]] || [[word:jirazdhedoko|jirazdhedoko]] || [[word:shirazdhedoko|shirazdhedoko]] || [[word:kirazdhedoko|kirazdhedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurazdhedoko|thuthurazdhedoko]] || [[word:jujurazdhedoko|jujurazdhedoko]] || [[word:shushurazdhedoko|shushurazdhedoko]] || [[word:kukurazdhedoko|kukurazdhedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorazdhedoko|thorazdhedoko]] || [[word:jorazdhedoko|jorazdhedoko]] || [[word:shorazdhedoko|shorazdhedoko]] || [[word:korazdhedoko|korazdhedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙razdhedoko|th忙razdhedoko]] || [[word:j忙razdhedoko|j忙razdhedoko]] || [[word:sh忙razdhedoko|sh忙razdhedoko]] || [[word:k忙razdhedoko|k忙razdhedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
